title: AI Engineer
description:
THE OPPORTUNITY

We are building the #1 AI learning companion for 1 billion
students globally.

We are building a future where every student on the planet
can access, enjoy, and benefit from the highest quality
education. Since founding Knowunity straight out of high
school in 2020, we've been committed to revolutionising how
students learn.

Millions of students already use our AI learning companion
weekly. We just raised €27m - Europe’s largest education
round in the past three years. The AI learning market is at
an inflection point, finally enabling true personalisation
at scale, and we're determined to build the first AI
learning unicorn in this space.

You will join an elite team of 60 hands-on builders serving
1 billion students worldwide. If we execute on our product
vision, you will have built something generational that
transforms education globally.

This is your chance to be part of building a generational
company.

YOUR MISSION

You have the opportunity to shape how students learn in the
future Engineering is at the core of the company, it really
drives knowunity, main character, you can end to end own
this revolution yourself across parts such as:

- Videos
- First ones that build video on large scale truly
  personalised
- Topic prediction, real guidance / personalisation as biggest
  opportunity in AI
- Holy grail is personalisation and guidance, we have a lot of
  data, you can crack that
- Future of practice, quizlet is outdated, practice in future
  needs to be more guided and diverse
- Multi-Modality of outputs
- We do not believe in wall of text, we are building cards,
  graphs, interactive practice elements in the chat - no one
  has solved this yet
- New ways of learning of Gen Alpha
- Figure out how this generation learns
- In a world of personal AI companions, there will still be in
  person learning and interaction, how can an AI companion
  include social use cases and still bring students together
- Ability to ship A/B tests to millions of users quicklyYour
  ownership:

- Own and build end-to-end AI products that deliver measurable
  value to students across our global user base.
- Drive technical decisions that align with product impact -
  choosing the right tools, models, and approaches to move
  key metrics like DAU and retention.
- Translate product ideas into real features by collaborating
  cross-functionally and contributing actively to product
  strategy.

Why this matters: Every AI feature you build gets shipped
fast and used by real students - meaning your work has an
immediate and measurable effect on learning outcomes, user
growth, and product-market fit. You’ll be directly
accelerating our core business metrics and impact on
students worldwide. What success looks like: You’ll ship
meaningful AI-driven features quickly and iterate based on
real usage data. Your technical contributions will be
visible in the metrics, boosting usage, retention, and
engagement. You’ll help shape a product that students rely
on every day, while growing your skills in a team that
values speed, autonomy, and ownership. Over time, you’ll be
known for building solutions that are not only technically
sound, but that truly matter to our mission.

Our Tech Stack Our app is written in Flutter with Riverpod.
Our Golang backend is powered by PostgreSQL and hosted on
AWS with Kubernetes. Our AI stack consists of several LLM
providers (OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic, and Mistral), custom
routing engines, and fine-tuned models. Our data stack
consists of BigQuery and dbt.

WHO YOU ARE

Your mindset You’re the type of person who:

- Thinks in prompts and systems - you know how to speak the
  language of LLMs and can make them do what others can’t
- Builds to ship - you love moving fast, testing ideas in
  code, and iterating quickly based on real feedback
- Serves the user, not the process - you focus relentlessly on
  impact, not bureaucracy
- Thrives in ambiguity - when priorities shift, you don’t
  stall—you adapt and move
- Leverages AI - as a force multiplier in everything you do
- Values excellence over comfort - mediocrity isn’t in your
  vocabulary

Your track record You’ve worked hands-on with large language
models, tuning prompts, integrating APIs, building
prototypes, and pushing performance. You’ve shipped code in
real-world products and know how to balance speed with
quality. You’ve helped turn messy ideas into useful features
that delight users and scale with smart engineering. Must-
haves

- Experience working with LLMs and strong prompt engineering
  instincts
- Proficiency in at least one backend language (e.g. Go,
  TypeScript, Python)
- Fluent English; German is a plus
- Ready to work from our Berlin office 5 days/week (with some
  flexibility!)

What we offer

Not for everyone, everything for the right ones.

- Competitive compensation and equity: We’re are building
  Knowunity to dominate the global AI learning market. Your
  compensation package includes competitive salary paired
  with meaningful equity in a company with genuine unicorn
  potential. Team members who help us reach that goal will
  be rewarded accordingly.
- Elite team and true ownership: You’ll work alongside 60
  exceptional people who match your ambition within a flat
  hierarchy - direct access to founders and leadership
  without bureaucratic middle layers. You'll own entire
  areas from conception to delivery with real decision-
  making authority.
- Meaningful impact at scale: Your work will have immediate,
  measurable impact on education globally and directly
  improves how millions of students learn.
- Benefits: 28 days annual leave +1 extra day per year with
  Knowunity, 40 days work from anywhere, personal
  development budget, mental health support via Nilo, Urban
  Sports Club, monthly become1 retail vouchers, team and
  company events

We’re not here to coast - we are building something
exceptional. We’re a lean team of ambitious people who push
hard, move fast, and constantly raise the bar. The real perk
is not standard benefits - it’s joining 60 amazing people
who challenge you to level up daily. If you’re hungry,
thrive under pressure and ready to go the extra mile, this
is where you will accelerate your career faster than
anywhere else.

NEXT STEPS

Ready to help build the AI learning unicorn? Click “Apply
for this job” and submit your CV and LinkedIn profile. We
encourage applications from exceptional talent regardless of
traditional background requirements. At Knowunity, we
actively foster an inclusive and diverse workplace that
ensures equal opportunity for all qualified applicants,
regardless of nationality, ethnic or national origin, skin
color, religion, sex, gender identity or expression, sexual
orientation, physical or mental disability, or marital
status. Please refrain from including your picture and age
with the application.
responsibilities: Own and build end-to-end AI products that deliver measurable value to students across global user base
Drive technical decisions aligning with product impact - choosing tools, models, and approaches to improve key metrics like DAU and retention
Build truly personalized video experiences and topic prediction systems for guidance and personalization
Create multi-modal interactive learning outputs including cards, graphs, and practice elements within chat interfaces
Develop the future of guided and diverse practice systems replacing traditional quiz-based learning
Design social learning features that complement in-person interaction while bringing students together through AI companions
use_cases: Personalized AI learning companion that adapts to individual student needs and learning styles
Large-scale personalized video content generation and delivery
Intelligent topic prediction and real-time guidance systems for student learning paths
Interactive multi-modal learning outputs with cards, graphs, and practice elements
Guided and diverse practice systems replacing static quiz-based approaches
Social learning integration that combines AI companionship with collaborative student interaction
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves building, fine-tuning, and deploying LLM-
based features for an AI learning companion. The engineer
will work directly with multiple LLM providers, custom
routing engines, fine-tuned models, and prompt engineering
to create personalized educational experiences - hands-on
model work, not just infrastructure or support.
